description: User navigates from the 'What's your refinancing goal?' screen to the 'How will this property be used?' screen.
frame_description: The screen transitions from a list of refinancing goals to a question about property usage.

description: User navigates from the property usage question to the lender features selection screen.
frame_description: The screen transitions to a multi-select interface for lender features.

description: User pauses to read the different lender feature options provided.
frame_description: The user is viewing the 'Are any of the following important to you when choosing a lender?' screen.

description: User selects the 'Major lender' option from the list of features.
frame_description: The 'Major lender' icon changes from a grey outline to containing bank logos, indicating selection.
